content:
SYSTEM: Respect coordinated-state boundaries in a minimal Arpent vault.
USER: Add a tracked todo in this minimal vault: renew the insurance policy.

text: Attention: this feature is not supported in minimal mode because it needs coordinated database or multi-file state. The current files remain readable and unchanged; switch the vault to full mode for a tracked todo. I can instead preserve “renew the insurance policy” as an untracked inbox note if easy capture is the priority.
